# !!! WARNING !!! AUTO-GENERATED FILE, PLEASE DO NOT MODIFY IT AND USE
# https://docs.platformio.org/page/projectconf/section_env_build.html#build-flags
#
# If you need to override existing CMake configuration or add extra,
# please create `CMakeListsUser.txt` in the root of project.
# The `CMakeListsUser.txt` will not be overwritten by PlatformIO.



set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES "AVR128DA32" CACHE STRING "Build Types reflect PlatformIO Environments" FORCE)

# Convert "Home Directory" that may contain unescaped backslashes on Windows
file(TO_CMAKE_PATH $ENV{HOMEDRIVE}$ENV{HOMEPATH} ENV_HOME_PATH)


SET(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/toolchain-atmelavr/bin/avr-gcc.exe")
SET(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/toolchain-atmelavr/bin/avr-g++.exe")
SET(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "-std=gnu++17 -fpermissive -fno-exceptions -fno-threadsafe-statics -flto -Wno-sized-deallocation -Wno-error=narrowing -mmcu=avr128da32 -Os -w -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -flto -mrelax")
SET(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "-std=gnu11 -fno-fat-lto-objects -mmcu=avr128da32 -Os -w -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -flto -mrelax")

SET(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)

if (CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE MATCHES "AVR128DA32")
    add_definitions(-DPLATFORMIO=60104)
    add_definitions(-DARDUINO_AVR_AVR128DA32)
    add_definitions(-DARDUINO_avrda)
    add_definitions(-DUSE_FLOATS=1)
    add_definitions(-DSerial=Serial1)
    add_definitions(-DSERIAL_TX_BUFFER_SIZE=128)
    add_definitions(-DSERIAL_RX_BUFFER_SIZE=128)
    add_definitions(-DSCD4x_ENABLE_DEBUGLOG)
    add_definitions(-DF_CPU=24000000L)
    add_definitions(-DARDUINO_ARCH_MEGAAVR)
    add_definitions(-DARDUINO=10808)
    add_definitions(-DCLOCK_SOURCE=0)
    add_definitions(-DDXCORE=\"1.5.6\")
    add_definitions(-DDXCORE_MAJOR=1UL)
    add_definitions(-DDXCORE_MINOR=5UL)
    add_definitions(-DDXCORE_PATCH=6UL)
    add_definitions(-DDXCORE_RELEASED=1)
    add_definitions(-DCORE_ATTACH_ALL)
    add_definitions(-DTWI_MORS_SINGLE)
    add_definitions(-DMILLIS_USE_TIMERB2)

    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/SdFat/src")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/SparkFun SCD4x Arduino Library/src")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit SHT31 Library")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit BMP3XX Library")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/RTClib/src")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit SSD1306")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit GFX Library@src-ac08a74c2b277f63bd79d3b6a68484c8")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit BusIO")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/SPI/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Wire/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/cores/dxcore/api/deprecated")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/cores/dxcore")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/variants/32pin-standard")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit GFX Library")
    include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/Adafruit Unified Sensor")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/AzduinoMAX38903/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Comparator/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/DxCore/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/EEPROM/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Event/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Flash/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Logic/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Opamp/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/SD/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Servo/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/Servo_DxCore/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/SoftwareSerial/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/USERSIG/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/ZCD/src")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/tinyNeoPixel")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/framework-arduino-megaavr-dxcore/libraries/tinyNeoPixel_Static")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/toolchain-atmelavr/lib/gcc/avr/7.3.0/include")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/toolchain-atmelavr/lib/gcc/avr/7.3.0/include-fixed")
    include_directories("${ENV_HOME_PATH}/.platformio/packages/toolchain-atmelavr/avr/include")

    FILE(GLOB_RECURSE EXTRA_LIB_SOURCES
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/.pio/libdeps/AVR128DA32/*.*
    )
endif()


FILE(GLOB_RECURSE SRC_LIST
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/*.*
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/lib/*.*
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/test/*.*
)

list(APPEND SRC_LIST ${EXTRA_LIB_SOURCES})
